menu
Web Development

WordPress Website Development

Custom, high-performance WordPress solutions designed to scale. We build secure, responsive, and SEO-friendly websites tailored to your brand.

What You Get

Our comprehensive development package ensures a robust foundation for your digital presence.

devices

Responsive Design

Perfect viewing experience across all devices, from mobile phones to large desktop monitors.

speed

Speed Optimization

Advanced caching and code minification for lightning-fast loading times and better UX.

search

SEO Friendly

Built with semantic HTML5 and schema markup to help you rank higher on search engines.

verified_user

Security Hardening

Protection against malware and brute force attacks with best-in-class security protocols.

palette

Custom Theme

A unique design tailored specifically to your brand identity, not just another template.

extension

Plugin Integration

Seamless configuration of essential tools for analytics, forms, and functionality.

Deliverables Checklist

  • check_circle Fully installed WordPress on your server
  • check_circle Home, About, Services, Contact & Blog pages setup
  • check_circle Contact form configuration with spam protection
  • check_circle Google Analytics & Search Console integration
  • check_circle XML Sitemap generation for search engines
  • check_circle 1 hour training session via Zoom

build Monthly Maintenance Available

Keep your site secure and updated. We offer ongoing support packages starting at $49/mo, including backups, plugin updates, and uptime monitoring.

Starting from
$1,200 USD
Delivery Time 14 Days
Revisions 2 Rounds
Support 30 Days Post-Launch
calendar_month Book Free Consultation

No commitment required.

Our Process

assignment

Discovery & Planning

Day 1-3

We analyze your requirements, define the site architecture, and create a project roadmap.

brush

Design & Prototyping

Day 4-7

We create wireframes and high-fidelity mockups for your approval before writing code.

code

Development & Testing

Day 8-12

Coding the theme, integrating plugins, and rigorous testing on all device types.

rocket_launch

Launch & Training

Day 13-14

We migrate the site to your live server and provide training on how to manage content.

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you use pre-made templates? expand_more

We primarily focus on custom themes to ensure uniqueness and performance. However, if you're on a tight budget, we can customize a premium theme to match your brand guidelines perfectly.

Will I be able to edit the website myself? expand_more

Absolutely. WordPress is user-friendly. We use page builders like Elementor or Gutenberg blocks, making it easy for you to edit text and images without touching code. We also provide a training session.

What do I need to provide to get started? expand_more

We'll need your logo, brand guidelines (colors, fonts), and the content for your pages (text and images). If you don't have content yet, we can use placeholders or offer copywriting services as an add-on.

Is hosting and domain included? expand_more

No, the domain and hosting are not included in the development fee. However, we can guide you in purchasing the right plan and will handle the setup and configuration on your chosen server.

Ready to scale your business with a high-performance website?

Book a free 15-minute consultation to discuss your project needs and get a custom quote.
